component.name: PackWarden
component.summary: Uninstall packages in bulk on any distribution

description.p: PackWarden lists every application installed on your system — from pacman, APT, DNF and Flatpak — in a single window, and lets you select and remove them in bulk. It works the same on every distribution — and if you are coming from Windows, it is the Bulk Crap Uninstaller you have been missing.

ul.li: One list for all package managers: pacman, APT, DNF, Flatpak
Search, filter by source, sort by installed size
Batch uninstall with a single confirmation

description.p: First release: pacman, APT, DNF and Flatpak support with bulk removal.
